descriptionTemplate: Gain [Block:Arg1] Shield. Restore [Arg2]% of {Endure} stacks as HP and remove {Endure}. Each time you are attacked, inflict [{Poison}:Arg4] {plural:[{Poison}:Arg4]|stack|stacks} of {Poison} to the attacker for 1 turn.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Gain [Block:Arg1] Shield. Restore [Arg2]% of {Endure} stacks as HP and remove half of {Endure}. Each time you are attacked, inflict [{Poison}:Arg4] {plural:[{Poison}:Arg4]|stack|stacks} of {Poison} to the attacker, lasting 1 turn.
